tags.name: Tokens
tags.description: Token usage tracking and cost analysis

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Gateway and local runtime session management

tags.name: Agent Studio
tags.description: Visual agent, team, workflow, run, and runtime orchestration

200.description: Runtime detection and active install jobs

get.summary: Get attribution report for an agent
get.description: Self-scope by default. Requester must match target agent (`x-agent-name` or username), unless admin uses `?privileged=1`.

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Time window in hours, integer range 1..720. Defaults to 24.

parameters.name: section
parameters.description: Comma-separated subset of identity,audit,mutations,cost. Defaults to all.

parameters.name: privileged
parameters.description: Set to 1 for admin override of self-scope checks.

parameters.name: x-agent-name
parameters.description: Attribution identity header used for self-scope authorization.

get.summary: Get self diagnostics for an agent
get.description: Self-scoped diagnostics by default. Cross-agent access requires `privileged=1` with admin credentials. Trend alerts are informational signals derived from current-vs-previous window deltas (error spikes, throughput drops, activity stalls).

parameters.name: privileged
parameters.description: Set to `1` to allow explicit admin cross-agent diagnostics access.

200.description: Heartbeat data with pending work items

post.summary: Create alert rule or evaluate rules

200.description: Login successful. Sets __Host-mc-session cookie (HTTPS) or mc-session (HTTP).

403.description: Incorrect password or API key user

get.summary: Preview retention policy and stale data counts

post.description: Registers a CLI tool directly without a gateway. Auto-creates agent if name doesn't exist.

get.description: Returns all supported agent frameworks with connection info and optional templates.

parameters.name: framework
parameters.description: Filter to a specific framework (e.g., langgraph)

parameters.name: templates
parameters.description: Include available templates when set to 'true'

200.description: Framework list or single framework detail

post.summary: Resolve websocket connect payload for a gateway

200.description: Resolved websocket URL and token metadata

get.summary: Get notification delivery status and statistics

200.description: Pipeline list with enriched step data and run counts

get.summary: List active PTY sessions and tmux sessions

post.summary: Check PTY support for a session and get WebSocket path

200.description: Merged gateway and local session list

get.summary: Get transcript snippets for a local session

post.summary: Create or replace a local skill

get.description: Unauthenticated liveness/readiness probe for upstream watchdogs. Returns 200 when the database is reachable, 503 otherwise. Intentionally exposes no row counts, identifiers, or error detail.

409.description: Tenant slug or linux user already exists

get.summary: Poll next task for an agent

parameters.name: agent
parameters.description: Agent name. Optional when x-agent-name header is provided.

parameters.name: x-agent-name
parameters.description: Agent attribution header used when `agent` query param is omitted.

200.description: Token usage data. Shape varies by action.
Webhook created. Secret is only shown in full on creation.

secret.description: Only present when regenerate_secret is true

get.description: Returns system workload metrics and an actionable recommendation: `normal`, `throttle`, `shed`, or `pause`. Thresholds are runtime-configurable via `MC_WORKLOAD_*` environment variables.

thresholds.description: Effective runtime thresholds after environment overrides.

post.summary: Run agent evaluations or manage golden sets

200.description: Eval results or golden set saved

Get GitHub sync status for all projects
Check Flight Deck local installation status
Generate context payload for agent session start
Get agent memory graph data (RAG vector DB stats)
Get wiki-link graph for memory files

get.summary: List gateway nodes or paired devices

post.summary: Device management actions (approve, reject, rotate-token, revoke-token)

get.summary: List agent assignments for a project
Parse natural language schedule expression to cron

post.summary: Create OS user and register as tenant

get.summary: Get system resource metrics (CPU, memory, disk, GPU, network, processes)

post.summary: Update Mission Control to a specific version

409.description: Working tree is dirty or release provenance is invalid

get.description: Lists Agent Studio agents in the authenticated workspace. Requires viewer role or higher.

post.description: Creates an Agent Studio agent in the authenticated workspace. Requires operator role or higher.

503.description: Agent Studio workspace root configuration is unavailable

delete.description: Deletes an Agent Studio agent in the authenticated workspace. Requires admin role.

409.description: Agent is referenced by a saved workflow

get.description: Lists Agent Studio teams in the authenticated workspace. Requires viewer role or higher.

post.description: Creates an Agent Studio team in the authenticated workspace. Requires operator role or higher.

409.description: Team name already exists or is referenced by a workflow

put.description: Replaces an Agent Studio team in the authenticated workspace. Requires operator role or higher.

409.description: Team name already exists or is referenced by a workflow

delete.description: Deletes an Agent Studio team in the authenticated workspace. Requires admin role.

409.description: Team is referenced by a workflow

get.description: Lists Agent Studio workflows in the authenticated workspace. Requires viewer role or higher.

post.description: Creates an Agent Studio workflow in the authenticated workspace. Requires operator role or higher.

put.description: Replaces an Agent Studio workflow in the authenticated workspace. Requires operator role or higher.

delete.description: Deletes an Agent Studio workflow in the authenticated workspace. Requires admin role.

get.description: Lists the latest Agent Studio runs in the authenticated workspace. Requires viewer role or higher.

post.description: Queues a run of an Agent Studio workflow in the authenticated workspace. Requires operator role or higher.

get.description: Returns an Agent Studio run and its event history in the authenticated workspace. Requires viewer role or higher.

post.summary: Approve or cancel an Agent Studio run
post.description: Applies an approval or cancellation action to an Agent Studio run. Requires operator role or higher.

409.description: Run action lost a state transition race or is not valid for the current status

get.description: Reports whether the Codex and Antigravity command-line runtimes are available. Requires viewer role or higher.

503.description: Agent Studio workspace root configuration is unavailable
